summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cognitive Mirror AI iteration 2. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core features working with real Firebase Auth, YouTube API integration, and demo account login. Music player shows real YouTube playlists with thumbnails and external links.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart rendering warnings: width(-1) and height(-1) errors in console

integration_issues.issue: 400 error during login process (fallback auth still works)

passed_tests: Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Landing page loads with proper branding and auth modal
Auth modal shows 'Continue with Google' button alongside email/password
Login with demo@student.com / demo123 works (backend fallback auth)
Dashboard loads with 6 metric cards (stress, fatigue, stability, cognitive, burnout, crisis)
Recent interventions panel shows sample data
Music Player opens from dashboard with music therapy toggle
Music Player shows REAL YouTube playlists with thumbnails and source badges
Playlist switching between 'Deep Calm (YouTube)' and 'Focus Recovery (YouTube)' works
External link button opens YouTube video in new tab
Backend API /api/music/playlists returns real YouTube data with embed_url and album_art
Backend API /api/auth/firebase endpoint accepts uid/email/name and creates users
Digital Twin Brain page loads with 3D visualization and interactive elements
Navigation between dashboard, twin-brain pages works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart responsive container sizing issues causing width/height -1 warnings. Consider improving Firebase auth error handling to reduce 400 errors during login flow.
